name: debug-workflow
description: Systematic debugging workflow: reproduce, isolate, hypothesize, verify, and fix. Structured approach to finding and resolving bugs.

bug_description.description: Description of the bug or unexpected behavior

error_output.description: Error messages, stack traces, or logs

steps.template:
Step 2 — Hypothesize:
Based on the error and reproduction:
- List 3-5 possible root causes ranked by likelihood
- For each hypothesis:
  - What evidence supports it?
  - What test would confirm/refute it?
  - What would the fix look like?

Step 3 — Isolate:
- Binary search the problem space
- Add targeted logging/breakpoints
- Test each hypothesis systematically
- Eliminate possibilities until one remains

Step 4 — Fix:
- Implement the minimal fix for confirmed root cause
- Verify fix resolves the original reproduction case
- Check for regressions (related functionality still works)
- Add test that catches this bug if it returns

Step 5 — Document:
- Root cause: [what was wrong]
- Fix: [what was changed]
- Prevention: [how to avoid similar bugs]
- Related: [other code that might have the same issue]
